response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the song 'Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore (2012 Version)'. The Reference JSON provides a base but lacks the specific variations used in this 2012 arrangement (e.g., '生命はまぶしい 朝を待っている'), so I relied heavily on on-screen burnt-in lyrics and audio for transcription. Discarded the unused parts of the JSON lyrics and added the spoken dialogue at the end of the clip. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to vocal audio with splits for mid-sentence pauses.

subtitles.original: 悲しい日々が 化石に変わるよ もうすぐ
subtitles.english: Those sad days will soon turn into fossils.

subtitles.original: あなたのその痛みを 眠りの森へと
subtitles.english: I will secretly lead your pain...

subtitles.original: ひそやかにみちびいてあげる
subtitles.english: ...to the forest of sleep.

subtitles.original: おやすみ すべてに 一途すぎた迷い子たち
subtitles.english: Goodnight, lost children too earnest in everything.

subtitles.original: はがゆさが希望に 進化する日まで...
subtitles.english: Until the day your impatience evolves into a dream...

subtitles.original: 生命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is radiant, waiting for the morning.

subtitles.original: 最後の懺悔も かなわないなら
subtitles.english: If even the final confession will not be granted...

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the darkness of this era will break into dawn.

subtitles.original: 世界よ まぶたを閉じて
subtitles.english: World! Close your eyes.

subtitles.original: 生命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎだす
subtitles.english: Life is awakening, weaving time itself.

subtitles.original: あなたの証拠を さかのぼるように
subtitles.english: As if tracing back the proof of your existence.

subtitles.original: そして 光が 胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then, the light reaches your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ 原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: Heart! Return to your origin!

subtitles.original: 涙の岸辺で ずっとたたずんだ
subtitles.english: I stood on the shore of tears for so long...

subtitles.original: 気持ちを 優しく包むように
subtitles.english: ...as if gently wrapping those feelings.

subtitles.original: 秘密の薬が
subtitles.english: The secret medicine...

subtitles.original: 思い出の沖へと 運ぶよ
subtitles.english: ...carries them to the offing of memories.

subtitles.original: おやすみ 汚れていた指も耳も
subtitles.english: Goodnight, both your dirty fingers and ears.

subtitles.original: この腕の中で もう眠りなさい
subtitles.english: Please sleep now within these arms.

subtitles.original: 生命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is radiant, waiting for the morning.

subtitles.original: 破れた聖書を 抱きしめるより
subtitles.english: Rather than clutching a torn Bible...

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the darkness of this era will break into dawn.

subtitles.original: あなたよ 祈りを捨てて
subtitles.english: You, cast away your prayers.

subtitles.original: 生命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎだす
subtitles.english: Life is awakening, weaving time itself.

subtitles.original: 自然のルールに その身をまかせ
subtitles.english: Entrust yourself to the laws of nature.

subtitles.original: そして 光が 胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then, the light reaches your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ 原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: Heart! Return to your origin!

subtitles.original: 生命はまぶしい 朝を待っている
subtitles.english: Life is radiant, waiting for the morning.

subtitles.original: 最後の懺悔も かなわないなら
subtitles.english: If even the final confession will not be granted...

subtitles.original: いつか時代の夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Someday the darkness of this era will break into dawn.

subtitles.original: 世界よ まぶたを閉じて
subtitles.english: World! Close your eyes.

subtitles.original: 生命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎだす
subtitles.english: Life is awakening, weaving time itself.

subtitles.original: あなたの証拠を さかのぼるように
subtitles.english: As if tracing back the proof of your existence.

subtitles.original: そして 光が 胸に届く
subtitles.english: And then, the light reaches your heart.

subtitles.original: 心よ 原始に戻れ
subtitles.english: Heart! Return to your origin!

subtitles.original: ノエル、フレア、マリン、みんな、どこ行っちゃったぺこなのー
subtitles.english: Noel, Flare, Marine, everyone, where did you go-peko?

subtitles.original: ま、いっか、3期生ならなんとかなるよな、きっと
subtitles.english: Well, whatever, I'm sure it'll work out since we're Gen 3.

subtitles.original: ということで、ここまでたくさんのゲストのみんなと、たくさんの曲を歌ってきましたがー
subtitles.english: Anyway, I've sung many songs with many guests so far...

subtitles.original: みんな、楽しんでるー？
subtitles.english: Is everyone having fun?
